2606.06261.title: DAST: A VLM-LLM Framework for Cross-Interface Anomaly Detection in O-RAN
2606.06261.paper_summary: O-RAN enables a disaggregated baseband stack with programmable functions that communicate over standardized open interfaces. The same openness that enables multi-vendor composition also expands the attack surface across logically decoupled tiers that make up the compute continuum. Among these threats, Denial-of-Service and performance-degradation attacks, which account for the majority of catalogued O-RAN threats, are particularly difficult to detect. Traditional Time-Series Anomaly Detection (TSAD) methods fail in this new regime where labelled baselines are scarce, threats evolve faster than detectors can be retrained, and the high-dimensional multivariate telemetry overwhelms monolithic inference models. To address these challenges, we present DAST, a zero-shot multi-agent framework for cross-interface anomaly detection in O-RAN that chains a three-stage VLM $\rightarrow$ LLM $\rightarrow$ VLM pipeline. DAST converts multivariate KPI streams into visual representations, scores textual per-interface descriptions against O-RAN domain knowledge, and verifies suspects on high-resolution heatmaps to output the problematic interfaces, the anomalous time intervals, an indicative O-RAN WG11-aligned operational impact rating and the decision rationale. We evaluate DAST on real network traces collected from an O-RAN testbed under representative performance degradation scenarios, achieving 0.910 F1-Score and 0.843 Accuracy, outperforming state-of-the-art TSAD baselines.
2606.06261.paper_summary_zh: O-RAN 使得基帶堆疊的解耦合成為可能，並具備可編程功能，這些功能通過標準化的開放介面進行通信。這種開放性不僅使得多廠商組合成為可能，還擴大了在邏輯上解耦合的層次中，構成計算連續體的攻擊面。在這些威脅中，拒絕服務和性能降級攻擊，佔據了大多數已編目 O-RAN 威脅，特別難以檢測。傳統的時間序列異常檢測 (TSAD) 方法在這種標籤基準稀缺、威脅演變速度超過檢測器重新訓練速度以及高維多變量遙測數據壓倒單一推斷模型的新環境中失效。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了 DAST，一個零樣本多代理框架，用於 O-RAN 中的跨介面異常檢測，該框架鏈接了一個三階段的 VLM $\rightarrow$ LLM $\rightarrow$ VLM 流程。DAST 將多變量 KPI 流轉換為視覺表示，根據 O-RAN 領域知識對每個介面的文本描述進行評分，並在高解析度熱圖上驗證可疑對象，以輸出問題介面、異常時間間隔、指示性 O-RAN WG11 對齊的操作影響評級和決策理由。我們在 O-RAN 測試平台上收集的真實網絡痕跡中評估 DAST，在代表性能降級場景下實現了 0.910 的 F1 分數和 0.843 的準確率，超越了最先進的 TSAD 基準。
2606.06261.author: Francesco Spinelli et.al.
2606.06261.authors: Francesco Spinelli, Esteban Municio, Pau Baguer, Gines Garcia-Aviles, Xavier Costa-Perez
